# Canonical Stack — Node Backend, Services, Hosting & Mobile

_Applies when: choosing the Node/TypeScript backend, Supabase services, Cloudflare hosting, or the Expo mobile client for any new app, package, or feature in this org._

This is the default toolbox for the API, backend services, hosting and mobile surfaces. Reach for it first before proposing an alternative. Stack-agnostic backend truths (contract-first APIs, release order, RLS-as-SSOT, env-secrets) live in `04-backend.md`, which this stack extends; the Kotlin/JVM analog is `08-stack-backend-kotlin.md`; the web-react frontend stack is `05-stack.md`.

## The stack

- **API**: Hono + Prisma (PostgreSQL). Auto-generated OpenAPI. (.NET / ASP.NET Core + EF Core + MediatR is the alternate backend for Clean-Architecture projects.)
- **Backend services**: Supabase (Postgres DB, Auth, Storage, Realtime, Edge Functions). Auth-only / Magic-Link + RLS is a valid minimal mode.
- **Hosting**: Cloudflare Pages (SPA `_redirects`); Cloudflare D1 where a serverless SQLite edge DB fits.
- **Mobile**: React Native + Expo, FSD-adapted (screens/features/entities/shared).
